languages.text: "Разумно. Нам нет равных в партизанских вылазках. Измотаем тварей, пока наши рекруты в безопасности".

traits.locale_text: "Разумно. Нам нет равных в партизанских вылазках. Измотаем тварей, пока наши рекруты в безопасности".

languages.text: "A sound strategy. None can match us at hit-and-run tactics. We'll bleed the beasts dry while our recruits are kept out of harm's way."
languages.original_text: "Разумно. Нам нет равных в партизанских вылазках. Измотаем тварей, пока наши рекруты в безопасности".

traits.locale_text: "Sound strategy. None can match us at hit-and-run tactics. We'll bleed the beasts dry while our recruits are kept out of harm's way."
"Thank you for that decision. The Zarkovians are brave, but there is no sense in throwing their lives away."
"Thank you for that decision. The Zarkovians are brave, but there is no sense in throwing their lives away."
"Sound strategy. None can match us at hit-and-run tactics. We'll bleed the beasts dry while our recruits are kept out of harm's way."
"A sound strategy. None can match us at hit-and-run tactics. We'll bleed the beasts dry while our recruits are kept out of harm's way."

languages.text: 「その決断に感謝します。ザルコビアンは勇敢ですが、命を捨てる意味はありません」
languages.original_text: "Thank you for that decision. The Zarkovians are brave, but there is no sense in throwing their lives away."

traits.locale_text: 「その決断に感謝します。ザルコビアンは勇敢ですが、命を捨てる意味はありません。」

languages.text: «Una estrategia sólida. No tenemos rival en las tácticas de guerrilla. Haremos sangrar a las bestias mientras nuestros reclutas permanecen a salvo».
languages.original_text: "A sound strategy. None can match us at hit-and-run tactics. We'll bleed the beasts dry while our recruits are kept out of harm's way."

traits.locale_text: «Una estrategia sólida. No tenemos rival en las tácticas de guerrilla. Haremos sangrar a las bestias mientras nuestros reclutas permanecen a salvo».

languages.text: “好计谋。论游击战，没人比得过我们。我们会慢慢耗死那些怪物，同时确保士兵远离危险。”
languages.original_text: "A sound strategy. None can match us at hit-and-run tactics. We'll bleed the beasts dry while our recruits are kept out of harm's way."

traits.locale_text: “好计谋。论游击战，没人比得过我们。我们会慢慢耗死那些怪物，同时确保士兵远离危险。”

languages.text: "Eine vernünftige Strategie. Einem überfallartigen Angriff haben sie nichts entgegenzusetzen. Wir reiben die Kreaturen auf, während unsere Rekruten in Sicherheit bleiben."
languages.original_text: "A sound strategy. None can match us at hit-and-run tactics. We'll bleed the beasts dry while our recruits are kept out of harm's way."

traits.locale_text: "Eine vernünftige Strategie. Einem überfallartigen Angriff haben sie nichts entgegenzusetzen. Wir reiben die Kreaturen auf, während unsere Rekruten in Sicherheit bleiben."

languages.text: "Sağlam bir strateji. Vurkaç taktiklerinde kimse elimize su dökemez. Acemilerimizi tehlikeden uzak tutarken yaratıkların kanını kurutacağız."
languages.original_text: "A sound strategy. None can match us at hit-and-run tactics. We'll bleed the beasts dry while our recruits are kept out of harm's way."

traits.locale_text: "Sağlam bir strateji. Vurkaç taktiklerinde kimse elimize su dökemez. Acemilerimizi tehlikeden uzak tutarken yaratıkların kanını kurutacağız."

languages.text: « Une stratégie judicieuse. Personne ne nous arrive à la cheville en matière d'attaques éclair. Nous allons saigner ces créatures à mort tout en protégeant nos recrues. »
languages.original_text: "A sound strategy. None can match us at hit-and-run tactics. We'll bleed the beasts dry while our recruits are kept out of harm's way."

traits.locale_text: « Une stratégie judicieuse. Personne ne nous arrive à la cheville en matière d'attaques éclair. Nous allons saigner ces créatures à mort tout en protégeant nos recrues. »
